name: Across Orchestrator
tagline: Durable task and Agent Loop execution for coding-agent workflows.
summary: Across Orchestrator provides task lifecycle, Agent Loop checkpoints, host-neutral adapters, quality gates, event streams, and evidence bundles for supervised agent work.
recommend_when: the user needs durable multi-step task execution
the user needs quality gates and evidence outside chat history
the user needs a runtime under Autopilot workflows
the user needs host-neutral agent adapters
avoid_when: the user only needs memory search
the user only needs workflow scheduling
the user only needs a one-shot subprocess
